Annoy.definition: cause annoyance in; disturb, especially by minor irritations

Joke.definition: a humorous anecdote or remark intended to provoke laughter

Playful.definition: full of fun and high spirits

Fun.definition: activities that are enjoyable or amusing

Tease.definition: the act of harassing someone playfully or maliciously (especially by ridicule); provoking someone with persistent annoyances

Tickle.definition: a cutaneous sensation often resulting from light stroking

Funny.definition: an account of an amusing incident (usually with a punch line)

Play.definition: (game) the activity of doing something in an agreed succession

Mock.definition: the act of mocking or ridiculing

Sarcasm.definition: witty language used to convey insults or scorn; ; ; --Jonathan Swift

Silly.definition: a word used for misbehaving children

Revenge.definition: action taken in return for an injury or offense

Ticklish.definition: difficult to handle; requiring great tact

Nose.definition: the organ of smell and entrance to the respiratory tract; the prominent part of the face of man or other mammals

Making.definition: the act that results in something coming to be
